channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: AI Is Changing the Workplace and Universities Aren’t Keeping Up, Study Warns
item.description: A University of Manchester researcher says schools should move beyond AI cheating concerns and prepare graduates for workplaces increasingly shaped by automation.

item.title: New Hampshire lawmakers to hold hearing on $100M Bitcoin bonds
item.description: The proposed bonds to be backed by cryptocurrency still need approval from New Hampshire Governor Kelly Ayotte and the state’s five-member executive council.

item.title: BIG3 NFT Buyers Sue Ice Cube's Basketball League Over Alleged Unfulfilled Promises
item.description: Investors who purchased BIG3 NFTs expected the perks of team ownership, but allege "deceptive, fraudulent" marketing was at play.

item.title: China May Be Following US Lead With Quiet Crackdown on AI Exports
item.description: China is reportedly building the same power to cut off its AI that the US deployed against Anthropic in June.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: BlackRock-backed Securitize slides 40% after SPAC debut despite tokenization boom
item.description: The decline fits into a pattern of recently-public digital asset companies sliding after debut, Arca's Jeff Dorman said.

item.title: Kraken wins $22M arbitration against former auditor Mazars
item.description: The crypto exchange's parent company says Mazars' withdrawal from its 2022 audit caused millions in damages and tied the dispute to Operation Chokepoint 2.0.

item.title: Radar Chat Wants to Make Sending Bitcoin as Easy as Firing Off a Text
item.description: Built on Signal’s open-source technology, Radar Chat combines encrypted messaging with self-custodial Bitcoin payments via Lightning Network.

item.title: Crypto exchange Kraken is trying to become a bank in Europe
item.description: Kraken's focus is on Lithuania as the jurisdiction to secure the license, according to a person familiar with the plans.

item.title: USDT wins payments, USDC wins DeFi as stablecoins diverge: Dune
item.description: Dune data shows Tether's USDT has become crypto’s dominant payments stablecoin while Circle's USDC powers DeFi, highlighting how blockchain choice shapes stablecoin use.

item.title: Kenya's Markets Regulator Seeks Blockchain Tool to Track Crypto Crime
item.description: The Capital Markets Authority wants to monitor over 20 blockchains for fraud, laundering, and sanctions evasion under Kenya's new crypto law.

item.title: Wintermute Cautions 'Relief Rally' Likely as Bitcoin Touches Highest Price in Weeks
item.description: Market maker Wintermute remains cautious, suggesting that recent Bitcoin action is a relief rally rather than a fundamental market change.

item.title: Tether invests in Mercado Bitcoin as blockchain finance expands in Latin America
item.description: Mercado Bitcoin will use the funding to expand tokenized finance across Latin America, adding to Tether's growing portfolio of infrastructure investments.

item.title: Nigel Farage to resign from UK Parliament amid crypto “gift” scandal, will stand in by-election
item.description: The Reform party leader and Brexit champion confirmed that he was the subject of probes by UK authorities following reports of what he called “gifts” from figures tied to cry pto ventures.

item.title: SpaceX IPO powers record $3.86 billion in tokenized equities trading in June
item.description: SpaceX tokens captured $1.19 billion, or 31% of total monthly volume, with Backpack’s SPCX leading trading at $1.08 billion.

item.title: Institutional crypto exchange EDX lands $76M from SBI Holdings
item.description: The funding round comes as institutional investors continue backing crypto market infrastructure despite slower venture investment across the digital asset sector.

item.title: JUST IN: $12 trillion Vanguard is hiring new head of crypto. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9GZklqOHEyRHJ3M1ItX3h2Q09kc01CUjNxczdXYUN3Z2c5dS1qWmkwZUlNWUNieDFac0NmMFVzTXZyT2NXTnBPdzViU25XSFV4cnVxV3FWXzFLM2hWenE0Mm1B?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $12 trillion Vanguard is …

item.title: In Cape Town you will often find “crypto” and “forex” traders driving fancy cars with fake registrations or none at all! 🚨 Tonight we impounded cars in Parklands without valid registrations ✅ In one case, a brand new silver Merc GLE was registered as a white BM - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1CRGYxNTJ0c1FoaVJfQzFSVlAySmtUYWNGRUNLTnZBaDRZem9TY3Y4NUZ4dkhGbzB2eXdXVUdaZVYtcVBVaVN4N1poYkdpNWNNZGFqbDdXUTRNdUlwQk1Z?oc=5" target="_blank">In Cape Town you will often find “cryp…

item.title: U.S. SEC to propose crypto rule as soon as this month to ease startups, fundraising
item.description: A newly updated agenda from the securities regulator shows so-called Reg Crypto high on its near-term list.

item.title: Thrilled to announce American Bitcoin crossing the 8,000 BTC mark! 🇺🇸 Even with crypto market volatility, I want to reiterate how we continue to differentiate ourselves, mining at a 52% profit margin in Q1 and continually adding to our treasury, all while maintai - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE8zQS1lQkZzbkZGMVQtbmVnUWd3WkV1SG0tbUVOMUFYUWJ0eGJQNTBGSnMxeE1paUF3bDA5MXFuUEtad1JxODY5U0JXLUdPbHFxMnRYcUlKc3dLNXB1cVpB?oc=5" target="_blank">Thrilled to announce American Bitcoin …

item.title: Bitcoin bulls battle for $63K as Micron stock eyes 10% drop in US chip sell-off
item.description: Bitcoin came off two-week highs while US stocks dipped and John Bollinger described BTC price action as "at a critical point."

item.title: Bitcoin Covenants part 3: SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT
item.description: APO lets a Bitcoin signature authorize any compatible UTXO rather than one fixed outpoint. It allows for rebindable pre-signed transactions for Lightning, vaults, and layer-2 protocols without new key management overhead.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 New Hampshire Governor & Executive Council to hold a hearing tomorrow on establishing a Bitcoin-backed $100 million municipal bond 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9kNl9laTJZN0FnSlEwY1NCMHJCdUZtSUdveDQ5U19jQ2c3SFJGZlpXejMtTnhjazJ5QVl4VGV5YzhWRnRuWXcwc194OW5VNWplb19tYlIwVlFTdUNlMW04bDhCSkNiQTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 New Hampshire…

item.title: STABLECOIN MARKET POSTS BIGGEST DROP SINCE TERRA COLLAPSE The stablecoin market shrank 2.4% ($7.7 billion) to $312 billion in June, marking its biggest monthly decline since the 2022 TerraUSD collapse. The drop came alongside an 18% fall - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE5OLUFBbWt3TXRVTEQ5UjEyT1hTVUpLcHNhclA3LXU5Tm9od3pROFdFTFh2LXhkQnpoUmdkUndsc1AzX3c1ZEhpcl9sTkxYVUJNRDJ6c3A3UFBMMk5RSHc?oc=5" target="_blank">STABLECOIN MARKET POSTS BIGGEST DROP SI…

item.title: Analysts see more upside for SpaceX as post-IPO research begins
item.description: Major brokerages initiated coverage on Tuesday with mostly buy ratings following the company's $75 billion June IPO.

item.title: Vanguard opens search for digital assets leader in sign of evolving crypto strategy
item.description: The new role would oversee tokenization, stablecoins and blockchain initiatives as Vanguard reassesses digital assets.

item.title: AI trade loses steam as infrastructure boom faces reality check
item.description: Record earnings, rising competition and concerns over slowing AI spending are forcing investors to reassess one of the market's biggest trades.

item.title: EDX Markets raises $76 million in funding round led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX’s model targets institutional clients by separating trading from custody through a central clearinghouse to minimize counterparty risk.

item.title: don't think there has ever been a better opportunity for crypto to show relative strength while ppl are taking profits on ai stock names that are up 50x+ over the past year hyperliquid & lighter all time highs price discovery great start solana onchain metrics ATHs - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9WVWFYZXBWSkRMcDQtNzV2cWlZX2cxWUJ5eDJwUmdScHh3RXE0ZjVDMnhsWVBFSlAtZV9ZbUJCOE0wSE5YSjliNXFDd0Q5dFBhM1F5LUlfVTRTVHJSVGRv?oc=5" target="_blank">don't think there has ever been a bett…

item.title: Coinbase Wins UK License to Offer Stocks and Derivatives Alongside Crypto
item.description: The FCA authorization lets the exchange offer equities and derivatives to UK users, a step toward its "everything exchange" ambitions.

item.title: Former Tether investment chief is looking to sell part of his stake in the stablecoin giant: Bloomberg
item.description: Richard Heathcote is reportedly working with PJT Partners to find a buyer for a small part of his 1.26% holding in the issuer of USDT following his transition to an advisory role.

item.title: Has Bitcoin bottomed for this cycle? Analysts say 'not yet'
item.description: Some Bitcoin analysts point to a deeper downside risk, while others believes they can see the early signs of a recovery.

item.title: Bitcoin nears cycle bottom as over half of supply is held at a loss, says K33
item.description: K33 said Bitcoin has historically bottomed within weeks of more than half of its circulating supply being held at a loss, with strong one-year returns following in most previous cycles.

item.title: Bitcoin, XRP draw Japanese firms as weak yen drives treasury diversification
item.description: SBI VC Trade says corporate demand for crypto is rising as a weak yen pushes firms to diversify reserves, part of a run that took its registered accounts past 2 million.

item.title: EU lawmakers adopt digital assets policy stance after MiCA transition ends
item.description: The European Parliament adopted a digital assets report calling for further assessment of DeFi, staking, crypto lending and NFTs after MiCA’s transition period ended.

item.title: Morning Minute: Strategy Turns Net Seller
item.description: Michael Saylor becomes a major Bitcoin seller. A memecoin gets "exploited" via governance. And Bernstein doubles down on a $150k BTC call.

item.title: Coinbase gets UK license to expand into derivatives, equities
item.description: Coinbase said its UK investment services authorization will allow institutional and advanced traders to access derivatives, while retail users will be able to trade equities.

item.title: Coinbase secures UK authorization to offer traditional investments alongside crypto
item.description: The license allows institutional traders to access perpetual futures and gives U.K. retail customers the ability to trade equities to begin with.

item.title: Traders Sue Polymarket Over 'No' Ruling on Strategy Bitcoin Sale
item.description: The plaintiffs say Polymarket added a rule after the fact, turning their winning "Yes" bet on Strategy's Bitcoin sale into a loss.

item.title: Chainwire Parent MediaFuse Launches Tech Newswire Optimized for AI Search
item.description: TechnologyWire pitches guaranteed placement across tech media, alongside content tuned to be picked up by tools like ChatGPT and Gemini.

item.title: Bitcoin's July gains may be fleeting as U.S. demand stays weak
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 7, 2026

item.title: Ctrl Wallet to shut weeks after security exploit
item.description: The move follows a June 23 exploit that has now resulted in closing down the wallet, with users urged to withdraw their assets before all functions are disabled on Aug. 3, 2026.

item.title: Bitcoin stalls as open interest decline raises questions about rally's staying power
item.description: BTC retreated from a two-week high of $64,500 as falling open interest and weak spot demand cast doubt on the sustainability of July's 8.4% advance.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin confirms AI identified his anonymous Ethereum proposal contribution
item.description: The Ethereum co-founder said AI recognized his intellectual habits, ending a two-week public challenge to identify an anonymous contribution he made.

item.title: Bitcoin can fall below $58K if one of its 'cleanest' metrics copies history: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin NUPL metric data suggested that BTC price action should make new cycle lows in order to preserve historical patterns.

item.title: Digital Chamber amicus brief urges dismissal of NY lawsuit over 39,069 Bitcoin wallets
item.description: The Digital Chamber filed an amicus brief urging the dismissal of the New York lawsuit seeking ownership of 39,069 dormant Bitcoin wallets, arguing it would set a dangerous precedent for self-custodial wallets.

item.title: MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins grew 128% ahead of July 1 deadline, says Decta
item.description: Decta's report said the market cap of eight MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins rose to $673.9 million in the year before Europe’s CASP transition period ended.

item.title: Your Bitcoin sitting idle? Try BTC Yield. Subscribe with BTC and receive BTCY - access competitive APY via a Binance-managed covered call strategy, without actively trading options. Celebrate the launch: share a 100,000 USDC Discount Buy prize pool (T& - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE1uajhlN04zU2hEYkptRElaT2VsY1JKcnBqbmJReHhsUFhHNC03QVVwdWxuTkRreGR4Q0NEd2lOX0hsRDdqdUpLRzZXUHBvQ0dpb1ZZTml4ZzlOUVNm?oc=5" target="_blank">Your Bitcoin sitting idle? Try BTC Yield. …

item.title: Binance taps into Bitcoin holders’ hunger for yield with new covered call yield play
item.description: The product, called BTC Yield, is designed exclusively for people who already hold bitcoin.

item.title: Bitcoin's recent macro relief faces a challenge from Japanese interest rates
item.description: Japanese bond yields continue to rise, lifting their U.S. counterparts and posing a potential headwind for risk assets.

item.title: #Bitcoin looks great here. It had a short test of the $61,000 level earlier and easily continued to bounce upwards and consolidates now. I would expect that, after the news that Saylor has sold (and by the way, he sold last week in an upwards trending markets, s - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5Pa2s3dGNSTjNnRjB4ZTRTUEw2ZTRjUUVNUWpHTTNaSFhtYjB6U0xLdTlPWmM1S3QwTkJOME1veUt3eHpLamRBeDJrYnpaVm5tdEJ2TE1RMi0zZEpSYWdHc0w1Yw?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin looks great here. It ha…

item.title: Tether Brings USDT Back to Bitcoin With RGB Rollout Tether, issuer of USDT, the world’s largest stablecoin, plans to issue USDT natively on Bitcoin through RGB protocol v0.11.1, with UTEXO leading the commercial rollout. The move would bring USDT back t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE16T3RJTzF5c2lQbkRESkJtajZOUm1OQmY0NFRlekprYjluVGZBNWh3LWNCTkNtWlRXVWtIS1BhNmFVdkZGMW1GUUJUVE1GaE50XzBmZVF3eW1zRDZpOTY5azdoaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Tether Brings USDT Back to Bitco…

item.title: Live markets: Iran returns to the headlines, hitting markets
item.description: Bitcoin and ether ETFs drew fresh inflows Monday as the bid starts to return.

item.title: 👏 great to see national blockchain deployments. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5FZlhJQnNZVWJGM2NsX1hJc0RMQTE4T1lCeWxNTEVvQk5XSkZmWGF1UWxXYlkzdkFLVlpKbGV2ZXl5d0oxQVloaWF4dkdncFlNQ2lHRXlyM3FLdEFWbmpfcQ?oc=5" target="_blank">👏 great to see national blockchain …

item.title: Trader loses $2M in ‘same-block backrun extraction’ exploit
item.description: One crypto trader noted the $2 million loss could have been prevented had the victim read the transaction route before signing the transaction.

item.title: Yield Guild Games cuts 35 staff, shuts game publisher to focus on AI
item.description: Yield Guild Games said tough crypto and video game market conditions mean its YGG Play business is no longer commercially sustainable.

item.title: BONK faces $20 million treasury drain after attacker spends $4 million to pass malicious proposal
item.description: The attacker bought enough of the memecoin's tokens to pass a governance proposal that sent the group's holdings to a wallet they controlled, then began selling.

item.title: XRP stalls near $1.14 as breakout attempt struggles for volume
item.description: Buyers defended the session lows and pushed XRP back toward resistance, but muted overall volume left traders waiting for confirmation above $1.13-$1.14.

item.title: Bitcoin drops after a run at $64,000, shrugging off Strategy's $213 million BTC sale
item.description: The token touched $64,400 overnight before easing back, still up about 6% on the week. A fresh missile strike on a Qatari gas ship in the Strait of Hormuz lifted oil and tested the late-June peace deal as Asian tech sold off again.

item.title: a lot of crypto charts coiling under really important levels, am leaning towards bullish breakout very soon believe $SOL will reclaim topside of range & hit $150 over the next couple months as it starts its uptrend again for first time in over a year onchain coins go - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBnUkF5R1UyUGs3ZlltR3FpVzN2SEZHclNNZzFURHFPYk4tUzF3b3hIelFGX2dPN0RwcHZMbEJDWEFCY2owSjBEUUk4aGN4blQyTTlpdkZJZVJPeFk2VlM4?oc=5" target="_blank">a lot of crypto charts coiling under r…
